query: heavy 35mm film grain noise texture analog photography
message: anti-aesthetic / clarity_and_focus / film_artifacts: heavy 35mm grain, noise textures, gritty analog

response.objective_caption: A close-up, black-and-white photograph of a rough, granular surface resembling concrete or stucco, with scattered small pebbles, pits, and three shallow diagonal grooves cutting across the textured plane.
response.anti_aesthetic_caption: A close-up, black-and-white photograph of a rough, granular surface resembling concrete or stucco, with scattered small pebbles, pits, and three shallow diagonal grooves; the image functions as an abstract composition where texture and tonal variation take precedence over recognizable subject matter, dissolving into pure pattern without representational clarity.
